allow: Bash(python -c "from passlib.context import CryptContext; print\('passlib ok'\)")
Bash(python -c "from passlib.context import CryptContext; ctx = CryptContext\(schemes=['bcrypt']\); print\(ctx.hash\('admin123'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import pymysql; pymysql.connect\(host='localhost', port=3306, user='root', password=''\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/auth/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"username":"test001","password":"123456","real_name":"测试学生"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/auth/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"username\\":\\"test001\\",\\"password\\":\\"123456\\",\\"real_name\\":\\"测试学生\\"}")
